title: neottia mucronata
intro: Neottia mucronata, also known as the beaked orchid or tongue orchid, is a type of flowering plant in the orchid family, native to North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat respiratory issues, skin conditions, and wounds due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Neottia mucronata include its potential to soothe sore throats, reduce fever, and promote wound healing. Neottia mucronata can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusible powder, and is often used in herbal remedies for its purported medicinal properties.
